Flow: /api/info → extract_info() → filter VTT URLs → store by video_id
Keywords: store cache url vtt video_id info extract
Pitfall: Store keyed by info.get('id') which may differ from URL-extracted video_id
Fix: Always pass video_id explicitly from frontend

Flow: _get_cached_subtitle() → check cache → fetch if miss → store (video_id, lang, fmt)
Keywords: cache content vtt srt ttl fetch hit miss
Pitfall: Cache key is (video_id lang fmt) tuple. TTL 30 minutes
Fix: Check TTL before returning cached content

Purpose: Single HTTP fetch from cached URL
Flow: Check global cooldown → get URL from store → HTTP GET → return text or None
Keywords: fetch http url vtt download request get
Pitfall: 429 sets global cooldown. NO retries. Single attempt only

Flow: Skip WEBVTT headers → parse timestamps → replace . with comma → strip VTT tags → output SRT
Keywords: vtt srt convert format timestamp tag strip
Pitfall: YouTube only provides VTT natively. SRT must be converted
Fix: Always fetch VTT first then convert. Cache both formats separately

Purpose: Main entry point for all subtitle access
Flow: Check content cache → check URL store TTL → fetch VTT → convert if SRT → cache result
Keywords: subtitle get cached entry point main access
Pitfall: Returns None if store miss or 429 cooldown or fetch failure
Fix: Accept video_id param. Check cache before fetch. Convert VTT→SRT on demand

Flow: On first 429: set timestamp to now + 300s. All fetches skip until expired
Keywords: 429 cooldown global rate limit timestamp skip
Fix: Single attempt. 5min global cooldown. No retries

Keywords: api endpoint subtitle vtt playback browser preview
Pitfall: Returns 429 with retry_after if in cooldown period
Fix: Frontend checks res.status === 429 and shows cooldown message

Flow: POST {url lang save_dir video_id} → _get_cached_subtitle(srt) → write file
Keywords: api endpoint download subtitle srt save file disk
Pitfall: Returns 429 with retry_after if in cooldown period
Fix: Handle duplicate filenames with counter suffix

Purpose: Client-side blob URL cache per language
Flow: Check cache[lang] → if miss fetch from /api/subtitle → create blob URL → cache
Keywords: frontend cache blob url vtt language client
Pitfall: Blob URLs must be revoked on new video to prevent memory leak
Fix: Clear cache and revoke all URLs when new video loaded

Pitfall: Rapid language switching causes multiple API calls

Purpose: Add VTT text track to DASH player
Keywords: shaka player track text vtt dash 1080p subtitle
Pitfall: Must call setTextTrackVisibility(true) after adding track
Fix: Separate code path for Shaka vs HTML5 video element

Purpose: Add VTT track to standard video player
Flow: Create <track> element → set src to blob URL → append to video → mode='showing'
Keywords: html5 video track element vtt blob standard 720p
Pitfall: Must remove existing tracks before adding new one

Flow: Fetch SRT → write temp file → ffmpeg subtitles filter → replace output
Keywords: ffmpeg burn embed subtitle download merge srt filter
Pitfall: Path escaping needed: backslash→forward slash, colon→escaped colon
